name: K-1
events: 27 Oct 1941 K-1 lays a minefield of the Mager?y Sund.
29 Oct 1941 K-1 lays a minefield off Breisund.
8 Nov 1941 The German merchant Flottbek (1930 GRT) is mined and sunk off the Mager?y-Sund after hitting a mine laid on 27 October 1941 by the Soviet submarine K-1.
16 Dec 1941 On 16 and 17 December 1941 K-1 lays four minefields between the Ullsfjord and the Lyngenfjord.
26 Dec 1941 The Norwegian merchant Kong Ring (1994 GRT) hits a mine in the Ullsfjord and sinks. The mine was laid during 16/17 December 1941 by the Russian submarine K-1.
28 Dec 1941 At 1228 hours K-1 fires two torpedoes at what is identified as a merchant of 4000 GRT off northern Norway in position 70°23'N, 22°26'E. The torpedoes miss their target.
6 Apr 1942 K-1 lays mines off the Kvaenangenfjord.
8 Apr 1942 K-1 lays more mines off the Kvaenangenfjord.
Also on this day the German merchant Kurzsee (734 GRT) is lost on a mine laid two day before in position 70°06'N, 21°00'E.
23 May 1942 The German merchant Asuncion (2454 GRT) is lost on a mine laid on 8 April 1942 off the Kvaenangenfjord in position 70°17'N, 21°21'E.
6 Aug 1942 K-1 lays mines of the Porsangerfjord.
11 Aug 1942 K-1 is damaged when she hits a mine, she is able to make port on the 14th.
12 Sep 1942 The German merchant Robert Bornhofen (6643 GRT) is lost on a mine laid by K-1 on 6 August 1942 off the Porsangerfjord in position 70°43'N, 25°58'E.
9 Nov 1942 K-1 lays mines of the Porsangerfjord.
6 Dec 1942 The German auxiliary patrol vessels V 6116/Ubier (350 BRT) and V 6117/Cherusker (304 GRT) are lost on mines laid on 9 November 1942 off the Porsangerfjord in position 70°56'N, 26°02'E.
